_README: Server-admin alert channel config for HumanityOS. COPY THIS to data/alert-channels.secrets.json (that name is gitignored because these entries hold tokens/URLs) and fill in the channels you want. The relay watchdog + disk-guard fan critical alerts out to every enabled channel via scripts/humanity-alert.js. No file / nothing enabled = silent no-op (alerting is opt-in). Each channel: set enabled:true to turn it on. `label` is optional, just for your own readability in logs. Test any time WITHOUT sending: HUMANITY_ALERT_DRYRUN=1 node scripts/humanity-alert.js "test message" critical
